nodes.label: Medi-Help Prototype Overview - Onboarding & Auth Section
Onboarding & Auth Flow (Splash to Register to Permissions)

edges.description: Screenshot is a title/overview card for the Medi-Help high-fidelity UI/UX prototype (Material 3, Jetpack Compose-ready, warm red identity, large type and big tap targets designed for elderly users and anyone wanting plain-language health explanations).

Section '1 - Onboarding & Auth' with flow sequence Splash -> Onboarding -> Login -> Register -> Permissions; two Android phone mockup frames are partially visible (first blank/splash, second with a 'Skip' link and a rounded peach-colored illustration placeholder, resembling an onboarding screen).
The Onboarding & Auth flow is the first documented section of the Medi-Help app prototype's UI/UX flow.
